$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for MCP tool exposure and Codex/Claude config defaults. Do NOT duplicate these values in templates, generators, or docs without reading from this file. Consumers: src/tool-dispatcher.ts (server tool registry), src/admin/routes.ts (admin UI client-config snippets), scripts/windows/gen-mcp-config.ps1 (build-time Codex/Claude config renderer). Drift is verified by src/admin/__tests__/config-drift.test.ts.
